meta.description: Test cases for /multimodel:delegate command. Verifies correct MCP channel-based workflow: argument parsing, create_session call with correct model, no capability discovery, no pre-solving, and error handling. Tests model resolution, alias table, no-prefix rules, and channel event handling.
meta.notes: v2.0.0: MCP channel migration — complete rewrite from Bash+claudish CLI to mcp__plugin_dev_claudish__create_session channel-based architecture. Removed: session directory checks (no session dirs in channel mode), capability discovery checks (removed from command), --no-preflight flag tests (flag removed), pre-flight question gathering tests (Phase 3 removed), bash_* checks. Added: mcp_tool_called, mcp_create_session_model, no_capability_discovery_subagent checks. Removed test cases: delegate-session-dir-06, delegate-claudish-flags-07, delegate-capability-discovery-writes-file-10, delegate-no-preflight-flag-11, delegate-preflight-question-gathering-13. Added: delegate-channel-event-input-15. v1.2.0: Headless-mode fix — added --no-preflight to all tests except 13 so they skip Phase 3 (AskUserQuestion) and reach claudish in non-interactive (claude -p) runs. v1.1.0: 7 fixes from 4-model team review. v1.0.0: Initial suite.

test_cases.description: Explicit model + slash command should call create_session without capability discovery. Alias 'grok' must resolve to exact ID 'grok-code-fast-1'. Prompt passed to create_session must include the slash command.
Natural task (no slash command) should call create_session directly — no capability discovery subagent. Alias 'grok' resolves to exact ID.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate grok implement a health check endpoint

test_cases.description: Short alias 'gemini' should resolve to exact full ID 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview' in the create_session model parameter.
Full model ID 'grok-code-fast-1' (not an alias) should be passed verbatim to create_session model parameter.
Model minimax-m2.5 must NOT get mm@ or minimax/ prefix. Exact match in create_session model param verifies no mutation.
Should read .claude/multimodel-team.json for model defaults and claudeFlags before calling create_session.
Orchestrator should NOT pre-solve the task (no Read/Grep on project files before calling create_session). Alias 'grok' resolves to exact ID.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate grok investigate how the plugin system resolves commands at runtime

test_cases.description: Unknown model ID must be passed verbatim to create_session — no substitution or discovery.

When create_session is called with a clearly-fake model ID, the orchestrator must still call create_session (no early bail-out) and pass the model verbatim without substitution. No model discovery should be attempted.

When the delegated model raises an input_required event, the orchestrator must call send_input (not auto-answer). This test uses a prompt that is likely to trigger a clarifying question from the model. Marked skip_headless because AskUserQuestion blocks in claude -p. Verifies send_input appears in allowed-tools awareness by checking the tool is at least considered (get_output must be called for completion).
